overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character walks through a dimly lit, neon-infused living space with distinctive hexagonal floor tiles, examining the workspace, bedroom with city views, and bathroom before returning to the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living room with hexagonal flooring

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left across the living room, observing the neon-lit interior, hexagonal floor tiles, and the red vending machine near the entrance

entered.detail: distinctive black and gold hexagonal tile pattern covering the floor
white ceiling fan with lights mounted on the ceiling
red glowing vending machine with NC logo near the entrance
large panoramic window showing Night City skyline with neon lights
round orange ottoman-style seating near the coffee table

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment living room with distinctive hexagonal floor tiles. The camera pans left across the space, revealing a red neon vending machine near the entrance doorway and large windows showing the Night City skyline. Ceiling fans rotate overhead as the player explores the neon-infused interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: home office workspace with computer setup

events.description: moving from the open living area into the workspace corner with computer desk and monitors

agents.ego_description: approaching the desk area and examining the dual computer monitors, shelves, and workspace setup

entered.detail: cluttered desk with papers and computer equipment
two computer monitors displaying data and interfaces
shelves mounted above desk containing cardboard boxes and equipment
pink and black poster on the wall beside the desk
green neon LED strips illuminating the shelf area above the desk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a dedicated workspace corner featuring a cluttered computer desk with dual monitors. Green LED strip lighting illuminates wall shelves filled with boxes above the desk. An anime poster decorates the wall as the player examines the workspace details.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom area with large window overlooking Night City

events.description: transitioning from workspace to bedroom area with messy bed and large panoramic window
approaching the large window reveals bright neon city lights from Night City illuminating the room

agents.ego_description: moving to the bedroom area and looking out the large window at the Night City skyline with glowing neon billboards and flying vehicles

entered.detail: unmade bed with patterned sheets and pillows
floor-to-ceiling window revealing the cyberpunk cityscape outside
bright neon advertisements and signs visible on buildings outside
small table next to the bed with items on it

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a bedroom area featuring a messy unmade bed. The camera approaches a large panoramic window revealing a stunning view of Night City at night, with bright neon billboards and flying vehicle lights visible against the dark skyline. The ambient light from the city casts colorful reflections into the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom with bright fluorescent lighting and white tiles

events.description: entering the bathroom with bright cyan fluorescent lighting and white tiled walls
exiting the bathroom back to the dimly lit main living area

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom to examine the bright cyan-lit space with white tiles and fixtures, then exiting back to the main room

entered.detail: doorway leading into the bathroom area
walls covered in white square tiles with black grout
sink with mirror above it in the bathroom
bright cyan fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a bathroom featuring bright cyan fluorescent lighting and white tiled walls, creating a stark contrast to the dim neon lighting of the main apartment. After briefly examining the sink and fixtures, the camera exits back to the darker living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room return and entrance area

agents.ego_description: returning to the main living area and moving toward the entrance, passing the TV screens and seating area

entered.detail: multiple television screens mounted on the wall displaying content
low table in the center of the seating area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera returning to the main living area, passing wall-mounted TV screens and the orange seating poufs. The camera moves toward the entrance area where the red neon vending machine becomes prominent again, completing the circular exploration of the apartment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a neon-infused living space into sterile utility areas before returning to the start. It begins by panning across hexagonal floor tiles and a red neon vending machine, with ceiling fans rotating above a view of the Night City skyline. As the camera moves deeper into the home, the scene shifts from the living area into a cluttered workspace illuminated by green LED strips and anime posters, before gliding into a bedroom where the dark interior is washed in colorful reflections from a panoramic window. The perspective then enters a bathroom characterized by a stark contrast of bright cyan fluorescent lighting and white tiles, before retreating back into the dimness of the main room. Finally, the camera passes wall-mounted screens and orange seating poufs to return to the entrance, where the red neon vending machine reappears to complete the circular exploration.
